title: task
description: python/src/lichen/interface/kiss/framing.py:237-239 - _try_extract_frame calls itself recursively when a KissError is caught. Malformed input with many consecutive invalid frame-like byte sequences could cause stack overflow. Failure scenario: attacker sends buffer with 1000+ sequences that each decode to invalid KISS frames, causing RecursionError.
close_reason: Fixed: converted recursive _try_extract_frame to iterative while-loop to prevent stack overflow from consecutive invalid frames
